name: Stuffed Date Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Slit the dates (about 8 ounces worth) and stuff with pecan halves; set aside.
2. In a saucepan, melt butter or margarine and stir in brown sugar until well blended. Remove from heat and cool to lukewarm.
3. Blend in sour cream, beaten eggs, and vanilla extract; mix thoroughly.
4. Stir together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and ground ginger. Add to the sour cream mixture; mix well.
5. Pour into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan. Arrange stuffed dates in lengthwise rows with 6 stuffed dates per row.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 25 to 30 minutes. Cool, then cut into bars, allowing one date per bar. Sift powdered sugar over the top if desired.
6 bars are made.
